detail: WMI-3 Arbitrary Free: amdtp_hid_remove() traverses 'driver_data' through a pointer that could be stale (type hid_device is freed elsewhere). Elements reached through this traversal are freed here. If the pointer was reclaimed, attacker controls what gets freed.

WMI-3 Arbitrary Free: logi_dj_remove() traverses 'hdev' through a pointer that could be stale (type dj_device is freed elsewhere). Elements reached through this traversal are freed here. If the pointer was reclaimed, attacker controls what gets freed.

WMI-3 Arbitrary Free: ishtp_hid_remove() traverses 'driver_data' through a pointer that could be stale (type hid_device is freed elsewhere). Elements reached through this traversal are freed here. If the pointer was reclaimed, attacker controls what gets freed.
